title: SearchImage() varlink API returns fewer results than `podman search`
body:
/kind bug

For example, `podman search busybox` returns 50 results, but `varlink call unix:/run/podman/io.podman/io.podman.SearchImage '{"name":"busybox"}'` returns only 2. I suspect the former also searches descriptions.

podman version 1.0.0

comments.body: I think this is now fixed in upstream podman.
